data.title: Tulipfest Blooms Bigger Than Ever at Botanica
data.description: Celebrate the arrival of spring with Tulipfest at Botanica, The Wichita Gardens in Kansas. From March 12, 2026, onwards, visitors can enjoy vibrant tulip displays, engaging brunch offerings, live musical performances, and activities for the whole family. Immerse yourself in the sights and scents of over [provide number] tulips in full bloom throughout the garden. Indulge in delectable brunch options while listening to live music, creating a perfect setting for a joyful spring outing. Celebrate the rejuvenation of the season at this month-long festival that promises [number] of fun-filled experiences for all attendees.

data.title: CATalyst Council’s Survey Shows 90% of Devoted Cat Owners Can Increase Veterinary Practice Revenue
data.description: In North Canton, Ohio, the CATalyst Council unveiled preliminary results from the CATalyst 2026 State of the Cat Report, marking it as the most extensive household survey focused on felines in the U.S. Thus far, the survey has gathered insights from over 60,000 U.S. households.  The survey indicates a substantial opportunity for veterinary practices, revealing that the feline patient segment is more expansive, engaged, and feasible for interventions than previously recognized, both from a clinical and financial perspective.

data.title: Women Are Set to Control More Wealth Than Ever but HSBC Finds Only a Minority Feel Prepared for the Financial Decisions Ahead
data.description: In New York, with the Great Wealth Transfer gaining momentum, women are projected to play a significant role in worldwide financial decision-making. By 2030, women are anticipated to oversee over 40% of global wealth, marking a substantial shift in financial influence. Despite being actively involved in their financial affairs, a recent study by HSBC reveals that numerous affluent women express a lack of readiness for the intricate financial choices that come with this responsibility.

data.title: Attain Partners' Reshma Patel-Jackson Named One of The Top 25 Women Leaders in Consulting for 2026 by The Consulting Report
data.description: A renowned management and technology consulting firm, Attain Partners, based in McLean, Virginia, revealed on March 12, 2026, its receipt of national recognition for demonstrating transformational leadership, innovation, and measurable impact within enterprise technology modernization. This acknowledgment highlights their exceptional contributions towards reshaping the industry landscape.

data.title: Cogeco and Cogeco Communications Schedule the Release of their Financial Results for the Second Quarter of Fiscal 2026 and Related Conference Call
data.description: In Montreal, on March 12, 2026, Cogeco Inc. (TSX: CGO) and Cogeco Communications Inc. (TSX: CCA) announced their plan to report financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 ending on February 28, 2026. The disclosure is scheduled for Thursday, April 9, 2026, after the market closes. A conference call is set for Friday, April 10, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. (Eastern Daylight Time) to deliberate on their financial and operational performance. Interested parties can access a live audio webcast of the analyst call on Cogeco's website, specifically the Investor Relations and Events and Presentations pages. For further details, the complete news article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: INVESTIGATION REMINDER: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Hub Group
data.description: Securities litigation partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced substantial losses in Hub Group to reach out to him directly. If you were impacted by significant losses in Hub Group stock or options, Wilson encourages you to contact him to explore your legal options.

data.title: INVESTIGATION REMINDER: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Wealthfront
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in Wealthfront to reach out to him for a consultation regarding their potential options. If you have been affected by losses in Wealthfront stocks or options and seek guidance, do not hesitate to contact him directly.

data.title: Tampa General Hospital Second Hospital in World Recognized for Excellence in Women's Integrated Surgical Health
data.description: The gynecologic surgical oncology program at Tampa General Hospital (TGH) in Tampa, Florida, has received a prestigious accolade, solidifying its status as a leading Center of Excellence in Women's Integrated Surgical Health. The recognition, announced on March 12, 2026, highlights the hospital's dedication to providing top-notch care for women. This achievement further cements TGH's reputation as a trusted healthcare provider in collaboration with the University of South Florida.

data.title: Seyfarth Leads Next Phase of Deal Execution and Diligence Through AI Partnership with Hebbia
data.description: A strategic partnership between Seyfarth Shaw LLP and Hebbia has been unveiled, focusing on expanding the utilization of Hebbia's AI-powered Matrix platform in Seyfarth's transactional practices. The collaboration aims to enhance due diligence, speed up deal execution, and facilitate legal analysis on a larger scale. In response to the challenges posed by a surge in unstructured data and tighter deal schedules, Seyfarth is leveraging AI technology to meet client demands for quicker, in-depth analysis. This initiative underscores the firm's commitment to innovation and efficiency in providing legal services.

data.title: PlanSource Certified as a Great Place to Work® for Fourth Consecutive Year
data.description: PlanSource, a prominent benefits administration technology and services company based in Orlando, Florida, was recently recognized for the fourth consecutive year as one of the best places to work by Great Place To Work®. The ranking, solely determined by employee feedback, highlights a workplace environment characterized by support, camaraderie, and motivation. This acknowledgment underscores a culture of mutual trust among employees, emphasizing the positive work experience provided by the company for its employees.

data.title: RQM+ Launches SMART Solutions Life Cycle Partnership Model
data.description: In Pittsburgh, a top MedTech CRO called RQM+ unveiled SMART Solutions, a new life cycle partnership model tailored to aid medical device and diagnostics firms in navigating the increasing complexity of regulations and development processes. This framework integrates regulatory, quality, clinical, reimbursement, and laboratory services to provide comprehensive support. RQM+ specializes in regulatory consulting, clinical trials, laboratory services, and reimbursements, and this initiative aims to assist companies in managing these processes effectively.SMART Solutions aims to streamline operations and provide strategic guidance for MedTech companies amidst evolving regulatory landscapes.

data.title: Janes Capital Partners Advises ExoAnalytic Solutions on its Pending Sale to Anduril
data.description: Today it was announced that Janes Capital Partners acted as the sole financial advisor for ExoAnalytic Solutions in its upcoming acquisition by Anduril Industries. Anduril has entered into a definitive agreement to purchase ExoAnalytic Solutions, a company based in Foothill Ranch, California. ExoAnalytic Solutions specializes in space domain awareness, missile defense, and space situation. The acquisition deal is still pending finalization, contingent upon meeting standard closing terms and receiving regulatory clearance.

data.title: Owkin Creates New Spin out Waiv, Formerly Owkin Dx, With $33M Financing
data.description: In Paris, Owkin, an AI company focused on biological complexities, has revealed the spin-out of Waiv (previously Owkin Dx) due to substantial investor interest. This development aims to leverage AI for precise testing to enhance patient identification for clinical trials and medical care. The move follows the successful introduction of Bioptimus, another Owkin incubated venture, in February 2024. The launch of Waiv underscores Owkin's commitment to advancing AI solutions in the medical field.
Richard W. Allen recently shared new stock trades involving TSM, KMI, and INTU.

data.title: JPMorgan Faces $328M Ponzi Lawsuit Over Transfers To Coinbase Wallets
data.description: JPMorgan Chase is facing a class action lawsuit for allegedly facilitating a $328 million cryptocurrency Ponzi scheme orchestrated by Goliath Ventures. The lawsuit, filed in U.S. District Court for the Northern District of California, accuses JPMorgan of turning a blind eye to suspicious transactions and permitting fraudulent wire transfers to Coinbase wallets. Goliath Ventures reportedly accrued $328 million from over 2,000 investors, with around $253 million deposited into JPMorgan's 0305 account between January 2023 and June 2025. Of this total, approximately $123 million was transferred to Goliath's Coinbase wallets. The scheme, led by CEO Christopher Delgado, operated from January 2023 to January 2026 before Delgado's arrest. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.
